name: Buzz's Lanikai
tagline: Old-school Kailua steakhouse steps from Lanikai Beach — the kiawe-grilled ahi steak is a local institution.
mustOrder: Kiawe-grilled ahi steak — seared over wood, served with garlic butter
Buzz's original steak — 10oz sirloin, simple and satisfying
Coconut shrimp — crispy and sweet, classic pupu
parking: Small parking lot in front, plus street parking on Kawailoa Rd. Beach traffic makes weekends tough — go weekday evenings.
talkStory: Buzz's has been here since the '60s and it looks like it — wood-paneled walls, tiki vibes, zero pretension. It's the kind of place where sandy-footed families sit next to couples on date night. The kiawe-grilled fish is the star — they use real local kiawe wood. Perfect post-beach dinner after a Lanikai day. BYOB used to be the move but they have a full bar now. Reservations don't exist — just show up and wait.
